Profile.Name: pia-qbittorrent
Profile.Overview: A Docker container combining qBittorrent with Private Internet Access (PIA) VPN, supporting both WireGuard and OpenVPN. Built on Alpine Linux for a minimal footprint.
Profile.Description: Fork of j4ym0/pia-qbittorrent with bug fixes and additional features: fixed WireGuard region selection, correct UID/GID handling for Unraid file ownership, configurable UMASK for download permissions, IPv6 kill switch, multi-arch (amd64 + arm64) support, and updated PIA server list.
Profile.Author: GeorgeAL78
